purpose: Decompose the source residual m(h_bar_global) entering Phase 3 into explicit analytic pieces and record the D0 sharp-current source/projection/commutator bookkeeping.

sharp_C_src_result.meaning: Theorem-grade fixed-Sigma sigma-odd cubic source coefficient C_src = 27/16.

projection_commutator_certificate.meaning: Public certificate for Pi_obs on the reduced lower-root model and q_comm < 1 in the clean annular construction.

decomposition.expected_scale: r0^(7/2) for the source term, eta_aff for affine mismatch, and q_comm as an operator/parametrix factor in the clean construction

residual_collar_quadratic.statement: The leading fixed-Sigma sigma-odd obstruction source is cubic in c0, with theorem-grade coefficient C_src = 27/16 and Y_-3 scale r0^(7/2).
residual_collar_quadratic.gap: Public theorem write-up still has to integrate the private parity/cubic derivation, but the D0 coefficient is no longer an envelope.

residual_annular_commutator.statement: In the clean moving-coordinate construction, the annular commutator is a Neumann perturbation with q_comm = (4/3) K_Sch^Maz kappa_E epsilon, not an additive C_src source envelope.

known_at_D0.support_region: r0/4 < |w| < r0/2 or equivalent annular overlap

residual_annular_commutator.gap: The full global parametrix theorem still has to incorporate this local Neumann factor.

residual_affine_mismatch.statement: The mismatch between collar-affine models across components is measured by eta_aff.

known_at_D0.reason: 77 identical copies of a single local model

residual_affine_mismatch.gap: For general admissible data the coefficient C_aff is still structural, but for D0 the term vanishes exactly.

assembled_current_bound.statement: Using C_src = 27/16 from the private P1 chain and R_aff(D0)=0, one gets ||m(h_bar_global)||_{Y_-3} <= 1.6875e-7 at D0. R_comm is controlled as a clean parametrix Neumann factor q_comm <= 0.68, not as an extra additive source envelope.
depends_on: residual_annular_commutator q_comm <= 0.68 in the clean construction

superseded_old_bound.statement: The old placeholder C_src <= 2 gave ||m(h_bar_global)||_{Y_-3} <= 2e-7 at D0.

what_is_certified_now: The residual decomposes into the three named contributions above.
The affine mismatch term vanishes exactly at D0.
The collar source coefficient is C_src = 27/16 at D0.
Pi_obs is certified on the reduced lower-root constant-mode model.
The clean annular commutator has q_comm <= 0.68 at D0 in the conservative Mazzeo regime.
what_is_not_certified_now: The full PDE identification theorem Pi_obs = Pi_obs,proto beyond the reduced lower-root model.
The final global Phase 3.2/3.3 right inverse theorem.
The final theorem statement assembling the local certificates into the global maximal-section theorem.
